title: katakurieuo #2634
definition:
1) to bring under one's power, to subject one's self, to subdue, master
 2) to hold in subjection, to be master of, exercise lordship over
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bring under one's power, to subject one's self, to subdue, master
 2) to hold in subjection, to be master of, exercise lordship over

    NASB:  to bend down:
